ingest.output: Successfully ingested 1,500,000 customer rows, 15,000,000 orders rows, and 59,986,052 lineitem rows. Zone maps created: 229 blocks for orders (o_orderdate), 916 blocks for lineitem (l_shipdate). Peak memory: 18.2 GB. Wall clock time: 6:47.65 (407 seconds).

Q1.notes: Returned 4 groups by (returnflag, linestatus). All aggregates are non-negative and reasonable. Total count_order: 59,142,609 rows, matching approximately the 59.98M lineitem rows ingested (filtered by shipdate <= 1998-09-02).

Q3.notes: Returned exactly 10 rows (LIMIT 10). All revenue values are positive and properly ordered in descending order. Order dates are all in early 1995 within the market segment filter (BUILDING, orderdate < 1995-03-15).

Q6.notes: Single revenue value returned: $1.23B. Value is positive and reasonable for SF10 dataset with filters (shipdate between 1994-01-01 and 1994-12-31, discount 0.05-0.07, quantity < 24).

summary: All steps passed successfully. Compilation succeeded with minor warnings. Ingestion completed in 407 seconds, processing 76.5M total rows with zone map indexing. Query execution (primary metric) completed in 4.4 seconds total: Q1=384ms, Q3=3659ms, Q6=185ms. All three queries produced correct result formats with reasonable values. Q3 is the performance bottleneck (83% of total query time), likely due to the three-table join (customer-orders-lineitem).
